reviews.review_title: Really Excited For This Type of App!!!
reviews.review_description:
I used to play a lot of learning games. They shaped my educational journey and instilled a love for games that help people. And ever since I was a kid I dreamed of being able to play in VR! And this!!! Helping people with games is the coolest thing ever! I'm really excited to see more! I want to see games that promote growth!

This game definitely feels like it was made with love and passion for helping people and I admire that. It's adorable and engaging and fun 😊
